data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly listed in the use case needs. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system sends email confirmations upon booking. The existing evidence only shows successful bookings but does not address the confirmation email aspect, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers upon booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
